Description

Auto-configuracoes Spring Boot do starter.

Discovery semantico de surfaces e avaliacao contextual de disponibilidade.

    CanonicalOperationResolver
    OpenApiUiSchemaAutoConfiguration.canonicalOperationResolver(OpenApiDocumentService openApiDocumentService, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.method.annotation.RequestMappingHandlerMapping requestMappingHandlerMapping)
    Publica o resolvedor canonico de operacoes OpenAPI a partir de path ou handler Spring MVC.
